draft:
To Whom It May Concern:


I am writing to provide this recommendation for Mr. Rohan Verma, an individual I have come to know through his work as an entrepreneur in the field of AI-driven content management. As an advisor to Mr. Verma, I am familiar with his work and can attest to his extraordinary abilities and achievements in his field.


By way of background, I am a seasoned professional with a diverse background in digital transformation, sustainability, and technology. Currently, I serve as a Senior Advisor for Digital Transformation at the Global Conservation Network, where I co-lead transformative initiatives to advance environmental action through digital ecosystems. In this role, I focus on integrating sustainability with business practices, enhancing corporate responsibility, and leveraging technology for environmental and social benefits.


In addition to my work at the Global Conservation Network, I am actively involved in the startup ecosystem as a mentor at LaunchPad Ventures, where I provide guidance to early-stage companies on leadership, team management, and sustainable business models. I am also an investor with the Lagos Business Angels Network, focusing on sustainable and environmental innovations. My board membership with the Common Metrics for Impact Measurement allows me to contribute to the development of frameworks for measuring social and environmental impact.


My previous experience includes leading economic transformation and sustainability initiatives at the Toronto Economic Development Council and managing digital transformation projects for high-net-worth clients as a Senior Manager at Cosmo Consulting Group. I have also held significant roles at Stratagem Advisory, where I managed technology consulting projects and advised on innovation incentives for global technology firms.


My educational background includes a Master of Environmental Arts in Resource Management from Oxford University and a Bachelor of Science in Engineering from Sheffield University. I am a licensed Professional Engineer (P.Eng) and a certified Project Management Professional (PMP), which further underscores my expertise in managing complex projects and driving sustainable innovation.


Throughout my career, I have developed extensive skills in nonprofit organizations, operations management, coaching, project management, client relations, leadership, and stakeholder management. My expertise in digital transformation, sustainability, corporate social responsibility strategy, and sustainable systems thinking has allowed me to make significant contributions to the organizations I have been a part of.


I first became acquainted with Mr. Verma through his company, Innovate AI, which was part of the LaunchPad Ventures 2023 cohort. As a mentor at LaunchPad Ventures, I had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Verma and his team, providing guidance and support as they developed their innovative AI-driven content management platform. Through this experience, I gained a deep understanding of Mr. Verma's capabilities as an entrepreneur and his extraordinary abilities in the field of AI and technology.


Mr. Verma's company, Innovate AI, has developed a groundbreaking platform that automates and streamlines the proposal and sales documentation process for enterprises using AI-driven content management. Their solution integrates with various tools such as CRM systems, communication apps, storage solutions, and legacy systems to manage the entire proposal workflow. One of the key features of Innovate AI's platform is its use of proprietary local language models to keep data secure and ensure that it never leaves the client's system, maintaining high data privacy standards. The platform is designed to automate mundane tasks, amplify expertise, and secure a competitive edge in proposal development.


Under Mr. Verma's leadership, Innovate AI has achieved significant milestones. The company has built the world's only platform for automating sales documentation through quantized local language models. This innovative solution has helped major organizations, including the World Health Organization and Upwork, to accelerate their procurement and sales documentation processes. In just six months, Innovate AI's platform has enabled customers to submit proposals worth over $750 million. Additionally, Mr. Verma has secured funding and backing from top investors, including LaunchPad Ventures, Oxford University, Silicon Valley Media Institute, and Horizon Edge Technologies. These achievements demonstrate Mr. Verma's extraordinary ability to develop and scale innovative solutions that address critical business needs.


Mr. Verma's success with Innovate AI is a testament to his extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and his deep expertise in AI and technology. His innovative approach to solving complex business problems, combined with his ability to secure significant funding and partnerships, sets him apart as a leader in his field. His work has not only transformed the way enterprises manage their proposal and sales documentation processes but has also established Innovate AI as a key player in the AI-driven content management space.


Beyond his achievements with Innovate AI, Mr. Verma has a rich background that further underscores his extraordinary abilities. Prior to founding Innovate AI, he was the Founder & CEO of StepUP, a VC-backed startup that created the world's first platform for virtual charity walks and running events. Under his leadership, StepUP gained recognition from prestigious organizations such as StartX and Catalyst, and won first place at a Palo Alto pitching event. This venture was later acquired, demonstrating Mr. Verma's ability to build and scale successful startups.


Mr. Verma's professional experience also includes significant roles in management consulting and strategy. He served as a Strategy Consultant for the International Monetary Fund, where he provided advisory and high-level strategic inputs to the Maharashtra Inclusive Growth Project. Additionally, he worked as a Senior Business Consultant at LexisNexis, where he helped improve operations and deliverables, turning around a rocky client relationship and generating additional revenue. His earlier roles at Analytica Solutions involved helping New Zealand's largest insurance company build its global analytics division and improving efficiency in their buyer assessment processes.


Mr. Verma's educational background further complements his professional experience. He holds a Bachelor of Technology in Civil Engineering from the Institute of Advanced Studies, Ahmedabad, which provided him with a strong foundation in technical and analytical skills. Throughout his career, he has demonstrated a keen ability to apply his technical knowledge to solve complex business problems and drive innovation.


In summary, Mr. Verma's extraordinary abilities are evident in his achievements as an entrepreneur, his successful track record in building and scaling innovative solutions, and his significant contributions to the field of AI and technology. His work with Innovate AI has transformed the way enterprises manage their proposal and sales documentation processes, and his previous ventures and professional experiences further underscore his expertise and leadership. I have no doubt that Mr. Verma will continue to make significant contributions to his field and drive innovation in the years to come.


Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions or require further information.


Sincerely,




Raj Menon, P.Eng, PMP
Senior Advisor, Digital Transformation
Global Conservation Network
final:
Dear USCIS,
 
I am honored to provide this recommendation in support of Mr. Rohan Verma, an individual I have come to know through his work as an entrepreneur in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. As an advisor to Mr. Verma, I am familiar with his work and can attest to his extraordinary abilities and achievements in this field.
 
I am a seasoned professional with a rich and diverse background in digital transformation, sustainability, and technology. As a Senior Advisor for Digital Transformation at the Global Conservation Network, I co-lead initiatives to promote environmental action through digital ecosystems, integrating sustainability with business practices. Beyond the Global Conservation Network, I mentor startups at LaunchPad Ventures, focusing on leadership and sustainable business models, and invest in sustainable innovations through the Lagos Business Angels Network. I serve on the board of Common Metrics for Impact Measurement, contributing to frameworks for assessing social and environmental impact. Previously, I spearheaded economic and sustainability projects at the Toronto Economic Development Council and managed digital transformation initiatives for high-net-worth clients at Cosmo Consulting Group, following significant roles at Stratagem Advisory in technology consulting. Throughout my career, I have honed skills in nonprofit work, operations management, coaching, project management, and stakeholder relations. My expertise in digital transformation, sustainability, and corporate social responsibility has enabled me to make impactful contributions to various organizations. These qualifications also allow me to confidently attest to Mr. Verma's extraordinary abilities in the field.
 
I first became acquainted with Mr. Verma through his company, Innovate AI, which was part of the LaunchPad Ventures 2023 cohort. As a mentor at LaunchPad Ventures, I had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Verma and his team, providing guidance and support as they developed their innovative AI-driven content management platform. Through this experience, I gained a deep understanding of Mr. Verma's capabilities as an entrepreneur and his extraordinary abilities in the field of AI and technology.
 
Mr. Verma's company, Innovate AI, has developed a groundbreaking platform that automates and streamlines the proposal and sales documentation process for enterprises using AI-driven content management. Their solution integrates with various tools such as CRM systems, communication apps, storage solutions, and legacy systems to manage the entire proposal workflow. One of the key features of Innovate AI's platform is its use of proprietary local language models to keep data secure and ensure that it never leaves the client's system, maintaining high data privacy standards. The platform is designed to automate mundane tasks, amplify expertise, and secure a competitive edge in proposal development.
 
Under Mr. Verma's leadership, Innovate AI has achieved significant milestones. The company has built the world's only platform for automating sales documentation through quantized local language models. This innovative solution has helped major organizations, including the World Health Organization and Upwork, to accelerate their procurement and sales documentation processes. In just six months, Innovate AI's platform has enabled customers to submit proposals worth over $750 million. Additionally, Mr. Verma has secured funding and backing from top investors, including LaunchPad Ventures, Oxford University, Silicon Valley Media Institute, and Horizon Edge Technologies. These achievements demonstrate Mr. Verma's extraordinary ability to develop and scale innovative solutions that address critical business needs.
 
Mr. Verma's success with Innovate AI is a testament to his extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and his deep expertise in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. His innovative approach to solving complex business problems, combined with his ability to secure significant funding and partnerships, sets him apart as a leader in his field. His work has not only transformed the way enterprises manage their proposal and sales documentation processes but has also established Innovate AI as a key player in the AI-driven content management space.
 
Beyond his accomplishments with Innovate AI, Mr. Verma has consistently showcased remarkable leadership and innovative thinking, particularly as the Founder & CEO of StepUP. StepUP introduced the world’s inaugural platform for virtual charity walks and running events, significantly transforming how technology is used for social impact. This groundbreaking platform allowed participants to engage in charitable activities from remote locations, boosting global engagement and raising awareness for numerous causes. By revolutionizing fundraising, StepUP demonstrated the immense potential of digital solutions to drive social change, successfully mobilizing individuals across the globe to support vital social and environmental initiatives.
 
Under Mr. Verma's visionary guidance, StepUP rapidly gained attention and admiration within the entrepreneurial community. The platform's innovative approach and tangible impact earned recognition from prestigious organizations such as StartX, known for supporting high-potential startups. A major acknowledgment of StepUP’s success was its first-place win at PitchForce, a competitive investor pitching event in Palo Alto. This achievement underscored Mr. Verma's skill in articulating the platform’s value to stakeholders and investors, further establishing his reputation as a leader in tech-driven social enterprises.
 
The World Economic Council's Young Entrepreneurs Circle is renowned for its selective membership, requiring candidates to demonstrate extraordinary achievements, leadership qualities, and a tangible impact in their fields. With an acceptance rate of less than 1%, the community highlights high standards and exceptional individuals. Mr. Verma's work with StepUP, a VC-backed initiative for virtual charity events, epitomizes the mission-driven innovation that Young Entrepreneurs Circle seek.
 
Similarly, Mr. Verma's acceptance into the Catalyst Innovators Hub highlights his exceptional entrepreneurial skills. Catalyst is globally recognized and highly selective, admitting only the top 6% of applicants. This program seeks entrepreneurs with groundbreaking ideas and the capacity to significantly impact the tech industry, which Mr. Verma achieved through his leadership at StepUP.
 
Moreover, Mr. Verma's involvement with the Startup Surge Pre-Accelerator underscores StepUP's potential for growth and impact. Known for its rigorous selection criteria, where only 8% of startups are accepted, Startup Surge has a proven track record of accelerating companies to top-tier global accelerators like LaunchPad Ventures and StartX. Mr. Verma's success through these prestigious platforms with StepUP highlights his extraordinary entrepreneurial vision and capability.
 
These accomplishments illustrate Mr. Verma's ability to guide innovative projects from concept to fruition. His strategic vision for StepUP, ultimately leading to its acquisition, demonstrates his adeptness in merging technological innovation with impactful social solutions. His journey with StepUP not only underscores his skill in navigating the tech entrepreneurship landscape but also reinforces his status as a key figure in creating scalable solutions for social good.
 
Mr. Verma's inclusion in esteemed programs such as the World Economic Council’s Young Entrepreneurs Circle, Catalyst Innovators Hub, and Startup Surge Pre-Accelerator through his work with StepUP underscores his exceptional ability to lead and innovate in the tech and entrepreneurial sectors.
 
The culmination of Mr. Verma's groundbreaking work with both Innovate AI and StepUP underscores his exceptional ability to drive innovation across diverse sectors. Through Innovate AI, he has transformed the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation by developing a platform that elevates business efficiency and data security through advanced AI solutions. This initiative sets a new benchmark for integrating AI into business operations, demonstrating Mr. Verma’s deep understanding of enterprise needs and his visionary approach to technological solutions.
 
Simultaneously, his leadership at StepUP has provided invaluable insights into leveraging digital tools for global engagement and social impact. The experiences and skills he garnered through StepUP have been essential in shaping the robust functionalities of Innovate AI, illustrating Mr. Verma’s ability to apply technological innovations across different contexts to achieve maximum impact. His work at both companies highlights a continuous thread of strategic thinking and technological mastery, cementing his role as a pivotal figure in AI-driven enterprise solutions.
 
In conclusion, Mr. Verma is a respected leader in the tech and entrepreneurial world. His contributions to the development of quantized local language models have redefined automation processes, offering substantial benefits to enterprises globally. His recognition by prestigious programs is a testament to his remarkable achievements and the potential for future leadership and innovation. As Mr. Verma continues to advance in his career, his work is poised to inspire future breakthroughs at the intersection of technology, business, and social impact, proving the immense value one visionary leader can bring to diverse industries.
 
Should you have any questions or need additional information, please do not hesitate to reach out to me.
 
Very truly yours,
 
Raj Menon
Senior Advisor, Digital Transformation
Global Conservation Network
[email contact here]
